provenance.title: ATF3 promotes erastin-induced ferroptosis by suppressing system Xc-
provenance.claim: ATF3 is reported as a stress sensor linked to erastin-induced ferroptosis and system Xc- regulation.

provenance.title: Ferroptosis: molecular mechanisms and health implications
provenance.claim: Ferroptosis is mechanistically tied to cystine import, glutathione metabolism, lipid peroxidation, and system Xc- biology.

markers.rationale: stress-response marker linked to erastin-induced ferroptosis
amino-acid transport/system Xc-associated stress biology marker
